ham.subject: Flipkart Order #1234567890 Shipped! Check delivery status
ham.body:
Hello Rohan,

Thank you for shopping with Flipkart. Your order #1234567890 has been shipped and is on its way.

Item: 7" 4K Smart TV
Quantity: 1
Price: ₹35,999

Shipping Partner: DHL Express
Tracking Number: 123456789012

You can check the status of your delivery by clicking on the link below:
<URL>

If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email.

Thank you for choosing Flipkart.

Best regards,
Flipkart Customer Support

spam.subject: URGENT: Your FedEx Package Delivery Fee is Pending!
spam.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

We regret to inform you that your FedEx shipment with reference number 987654321 has not been delivered due to an outstanding delivery fee of ₹1,200.

To avoid further delay, please settle the pending amount immediately. Failure to do so may result in the package being returned to the sender.

Click the link below to make a payment:
<URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
FedEx Customer Support
